name: Citrus~pecan Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat waffle iron.
2. Blend orange juice, milk, yolks, butter, lemon juice and grated peels in a large bowl.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt in another bowl.
4. Mix the dry ingredients into the liquid ingredients.
5. Stir in pecans.
6. Beat egg whites and cream of tartar until soft peaks form in a separate bowl.
7. Add sugar and beat until stiff but not dry.
8. Gently fold 1/4 of the whites into the batter to lighten, then fold in the remaining whites.
9. Pour the batter into the preheated waffle iron and bake until the waffles are golden brown.
10. Makes about 4 cups of batter.
